project.name: 居民健康画像
project.visualSpecExcerpt: Reference image: dark cyberpunk health dashboard with 3-column layout (left: vital signs, center: 3D human body model, right: analytics modules). Converting to Apple Copy Design System: light background #f2f2f7, brand blue #007aff, clean rounded cards with subtle shadows, DM Sans typography. Layout: 3-column grid with left vitals panel, center body visualization area, right analytics (sleep/exercise/organ/risk prediction). Top header with user info and health score.
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Healthcare dashboard, clean Apple-inspired light UI, blue accent, information-dense data panels with card-based layout
project.designRead: healthcare dashboard / B2B medical platform / professional clean / information-dense / avoid clutter

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: #007aff as primary action/highlight, state colors for health status (green=normal, yellow=sub-health, red=high-risk)
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single brand blue #007aff from Apple Copy library
colorSystem.stateColors: health-status: green #34c759 normal, yellow #ff9f0a sub-health, red #ff3b30 high-risk

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Apple-style rounded cards (19.2px radius from library), rounded pills for tags, large radius cards
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: DM Sans as primary font family, clean hierarchy with bold headings and regular body text
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: generous whitespace with 3.84px base spacing, comfortable padding in cards (16-24px)
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: rounded cards with subtle shadows, pill-shaped badges for health status, clean data tables
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: subtle shadow cards (shadow-sm·Card), clean white backgrounds, no heavy elevation
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: clean SVG icons, medical/health themed illustrations
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover transitions, clean focus states

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: top header bar with user info and back button, no sidebar for single-page dashboard
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: #007aff brand blue from Apple Copy library
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: 19.2px default from library, 12px for smaller elements, 9999px for pills
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: subtle shadow-sm·Card elevation, white card surfaces on #f2f2f7 background
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: rounded primary buttons with #007aff, secondary buttons with ghost style
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: tight grid for data panels, generous spacing for visual comfort

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Apple Copy library with #007aff primary blue, #f2f2f7 background, DM Sans font, 19.2px radius. Light, clean, professional healthcare dashboard.

pages.title: 居民健康画像
pages.visualNorthStar: 3-column dashboard: left=vital signs list, center=body silhouette with status badges, right=analytics cards (sleep, exercise, organ, risk prediction). Header with user profile and overall health score. Apple-style clean white cards on light gray background.
pages.compositionPattern: 3-column data dashboard with header summary bar

continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: rounded cards with subtle shadow, pill status badges, clean data display
